feed.title: JuiceMount blog
feed.subtitle: Comparisons, guides, and field notes from building JuiceMount. Every number is measured and attributed, or dated and sourced.

entry.title: LucidLink alternatives in 2026, including the one we built
entry.summary: We build one of the options, so the disclosure comes first, every price carries its checked date, and our own entry gets the harshest paragraph on the page.

entry.title: Why your NAS feels slow over a VPN (it's not your bandwidth)
entry.summary: The speed test says the line is fine and the share still crawls: a worked minute of editing shows the tax is round trips times latency, and bandwidth barely touches it.

entry.title: Your bytes are your bytes: what leaving actually costs
entry.summary: The monthly meter is on the pricing page; the exit meter is the one that tells you who owns the library, so here it is, read in public at 20 TB.
